videoSnippet.title: Unlikely Leader Emerges! || Shamsiddin Vokhidov vs Ian Nepomniachtchi || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Vokhidov, Shamsiddin (2637) - Nepomniachtchi, Ian (2733)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.06.11
B51 Sicilian, Canal-Sokolsky (Nimzovich-Rossolimo, Moscow) attack

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.Bb5+ Nd7 4.d4 cxd4 5.Nxd4 Nf6 6.O-O g6 7.Re1 Bg7 8.Bf1 Nc5 9.f3 O-O 10.Be3 d5 11.e5 Ne8 12.f4 f6 13.Nf3 b6 14.Nc3 Nc7 15.h3 Bb7 16.exf6 exf6 17.f5 Qd7 18.b4 N5a6 19.fxg6 hxg6 20.a3 Rae8 21.Qd2 Nb8 22.Rad1 Nc6 23.Bc4 Ne5 24.Nxe5 fxe5 25.Nxd5 Bxd5 26.Bxd5+ Qxd5 27.Qxd5+ Nxd5 28.Rxd5 Rc8 29.Re2 Rc4 30.Rd6 Rf6 31.Rd8+ Rf8 32.Red2 Rc3 33.R8d3 Rfc8 34.a4 Bf8 35.b5 e4 36.Rxc3 Rxc3 37.Kf2 Be7 38.Rd7 Bh4+ 39.g3 Bxg3+ 40.Kxg3 Rxe3+ 41.Kg4 Rf3 42.Rxa7 Kf8 43.a5 Rf6 44.axb6 Rxb6 45.c4


0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:40 Game Starts!
02:48 CNG (d5)
11:40 IWITP
14:00 Standings after Round 5
